Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotEffect.Reflection

  • Uses of PotEffect.Reflection in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotEffect.Reflection
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotEffect.Reflection
    PotEffect.Reflection.blurRadius(double radius)
    Sets the blur radius for the reflection effect.
    PotEffect.Reflection
    PotEffect.Reflection.direction(double deg)
    Sets the angular direction of the reflection relative to the original element.
    PotEffect.Reflection
    PotEffect.Reflection.distance(double d)
    Sets the vertical distance between the original element and the start of its reflection.
    PotEffect.Reflection
    PotEffect.Reflection.opacity(double start, double end)
    Sets the opacity gradient for the reflection effect.
    static PotEffect.Reflection
    PotEffect.reflection()
    Creates and returns a new, default configuration for a reflection effect.
